_publications._publicationTitle: Destabilizing NF1 variants act in a dominant negative manner through neurofibromin dimerization.

_contextSnippet: we transduced a previously characterized immortalized peripheral neurofibroma-derived Schwann cell line (ipNF95.11b C) in which we had knocked out NF1. We saw the same phenotype as in the 293T
details: Confirmed same phenotype as 293T cells with L847P mutant expressing considerably less than wild type under identical conditions
